attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.GLOBAL_NAME,
ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14,
ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15,
ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.ORG_ID, 
ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, 
ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.REASON_CODE FMV_REASON_CODE,
ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT,
ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE1, 
ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6,
ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.LINE_NUMBER,
ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE7,
ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.ATTRIBUTE9
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES
WHERE EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
AND EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.GLOBAL_NAME=ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.GLOBAL_NAME )

SELECT 
SCRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
SCRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, 
SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT,
SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14,
SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE1,
SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6,
SCRCTL.ORG_ID,
SCRCTL.LINE_NUMBER ,
SCRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME,
SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE7,
SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15,
 SCRCTL.RULE_END_DATE,
 SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
 SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE9,
 SCRCTL.REASON_CODE FMV_REASON_CODE,
SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE10
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SCRCTL
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES
WHERE EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=SCRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
AND EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES.GLOBAL_NAME=SCRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME )
